description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named SNL-CI that runs on pull request events for files not matching *.md. The workflow should have no repository content permissions and cancel any in-progress runs for the same workflow and reference. Define two jobs, CUDA_12_2_CPP20 and HIP_5_6_1, each running on a specific environment. For each job, check out the kokkos/kokkos repository, configure Kokkos with specific CMake options, build and install it, and then run tests with a 3600-second timeout.
